title: Obsidian Retrieval Quality
checks: node --test --test-name-pattern "memory_search surfaces integrity warnings in full-detail MCP output|memory_unfold resolves by source_path and by source_file plus heading|logs weak and strong retrieval use signals|rag:query reports retrieval mode and widens the quality candidate pool" tools/obsidian-memory/tests/query-surface.test.mjs

stories.title: Add retrieval reporting over weak and strong usage events
stories.notes: Implemented tools/obsidian-memory/src/rag-report.mjs, the rag:report package script, and tools/obsidian-memory/tests/rag-report.test.mjs. Verified the vault-focused check set passes in the external worktree after bootstrapping it with pnpm install.

stories.title: Seed the first judged retrieval eval harness from observed queries
stories.notes: Added tools/obsidian-memory/src/rag-retrieval-evals.mjs, tools/obsidian-memory/tests/rag-retrieval-evals.test.mjs, and the rag:evals package script. The judged suite locks down representative implementation, lexical, and routing-guidance queries across default and quality retrieval modes using typed fixture corpora, and the required STORY-2 verification set passed in the external worktree.

stories.title: Tighten hybrid fusion once reporting shows a real false-positive pattern
stories.notes: Use the new reporting/eval data to decide whether weighted fusion or support-aware semantic promotion needs another vault-only pass. Do not expand into unrelated skills or hook work.

stories.title: Finalize vault verification and publish once repo push gates are clear
stories.notes: The vault-focused verification set passed in the external worktree, the pre-push gate was repaired in `tools/agent-skills`, and `git push -u origin feat/obsidian-rag-retrieval-spec` succeeded.
